name: Cartomancer
description: You can use a card deck as a spellcasting focus. You learn the Prestidigitation cantrip and can conceal its verbal and somatic components as ordinary conversation and card handling. When you finish a long rest, you can choose one spell from your class's spell list (1 action casting time, level for which you have slots) and imbue it into a card for 8 hours. You can cast this spell as a bonus action.
